# LinkedIn Company Page Setup Guide

## Purpose

This guide walks you through setting up and optimizing a LinkedIn Company Page for B2B marketing success. LinkedIn is the premier platform for professional networking, B2B lead generation, and thought leadership.

**Best For:** B2B companies, professional services, SaaS, consulting, recruiting, corporate brands

**Target Demographics:** Professionals 25-55, decision-makers, business owners, job seekers

---

## 1. PAGE SETUP CHECKLIST

### 1.1 Basic Information

- [ ] **Company Name:** [[LEGAL_NAME]] (exactly as it appears legally)
- [ ] **LinkedIn Public URL:** linkedin.com/company/[[CUSTOM_URL]]
  - _Choose a short, memorable URL_
- [ ] **Website URL:** [[COMPANY_WEBSITE]]
- [ ] **Company Size:** [[1-10 / 11-50 / 51-200 / 201-500 / etc.]]
- [ ] **Company Type:** [[Public / Private / Non-profit / etc.]]
- [ ] **Year Founded:** [[YYYY]]
- [ ] **Industry:** [[SELECT_FROM_LINKEDIN_LIST]]
- [ ] **Specialties:** [[KEYWORD_1]], [[KEYWORD_2]], [[KEYWORD_3]] (up to 20)

### 1.2 Location Information

- [ ] **Headquarters:** [[CITY, STATE, COUNTRY]]
- [ ] **Additional Locations:** [[LIST_IF_APPLICABLE]]

---

## 2. VISUAL BRANDING

### 2.1 Logo Specifications

- [ ] **Format:** PNG or JPG
- [ ] **Size:** 300 x 300 pixels minimum
- [ ] **File Size:** Under 8 MB
- [ ] **Style:** Clean, recognizable at small sizes
- [ ] **Background:** Transparent or solid color (matches brand)

**File Name:** linkedin-logo-300x300.png

### 2.2 Cover Photo Specifications

- [ ] **Dimensions:** 1128 x 191 pixels (minimum)
- [ ] **Format:** PNG or JPG
- [ ] **File Size:** Under 8 MB
- [ ] **Content Ideas:**
  - Team photo or office space
  - Product/service showcase
  - Value proposition statement
  - Event/conference imagery
  - Brand tagline and imagery

**Recommended Cover Photo Elements:**

- Company tagline or value proposition
- Contact information (subtle)
- High-quality imagery
- Consistent brand colors
- Minimal text (under 20% of image)

**File Name:** linkedin-cover-1128x191.png

---

## 3. PAGE DESCRIPTIONS

### 3.1 Tagline (120 characters max)

_Your elevator pitch - what you do and who you help_

**Example:** _"Helping small businesses grow through affordable digital marketing solutions"_

**Your Tagline:** [[TAGLINE]]

### 3.2 About Section (2000 characters max)

**Structure:**

1. **Opening Hook** (2-3 sentences): What you do and why it matters
2. **Problem You Solve** (2-3 sentences): The challenge your audience faces
3. **Your Solution** (2-3 sentences): How you solve it uniquely
4. **Proof Points** (bullet points): Key achievements, differentiators
5. **Call-to-Action** (1-2 sentences): What you want visitors to do

**Template:**

```
At [[COMPANY_NAME]], we help [[TARGET_AUDIENCE]] achieve [[DESIRED_OUTCOME]] through [[YOUR_APPROACH]].

Many [[TARGET_AUDIENCE]] struggle with [[COMMON_PROBLEM]], which leads to [[NEGATIVE_CONSEQUENCE]]. Without [[SOLUTION_TYPE]], they find themselves [[DESCRIBE_PAIN_POINT]].

We believe [[YOUR_PHILOSOPHY]]. That's why we've developed [[YOUR_METHOD/SOLUTION]] that [[KEY_BENEFIT]]. Our approach focuses on [[UNIQUE_APPROACH]] to deliver [[MEASURABLE_RESULTS]].

✓ [[PROOF_POINT_1]]
✓ [[PROOF_POINT_2]]
✓ [[PROOF_POINT_3]]
✓ [[PROOF_POINT_4]]

Ready to [[DESIRED_ACTION]]? [[CALL_TO_ACTION]].

Visit us at [[WEBSITE]] or connect with our team to learn more.
```

**Your About Section:**
[[WRITE_YOUR_ABOUT_SECTION_HERE]]

---

## 4. FEATURES OPTIMIZATION

### 4.1 Custom Button

Choose your primary call-to-action:

- [ ] Visit Website
- [ ] Contact Us
- [ ] Learn More
- [ ] Register
- [ ] Sign Up
- [ ] Visit Portfolio

**Button URL:** [[LANDING_PAGE_URL]]

### 4.2 Company Hashtags

Add 3 hashtags your company follows and engages with:

1. #[[HASHTAG_1]]
2. #[[HASHTAG_2]]
3. #[[HASHTAG_3]]

### 4.3 Languages

If applicable, add page in additional languages:

- [ ] [[LANGUAGE_1]] - Managed by [[NAME]]
- [ ] [[LANGUAGE_2]] - Managed by [[NAME]]

### 4.4 Featured Groups

Join and feature relevant LinkedIn Groups (up to 3):

1. [[GROUP_1]]
2. [[GROUP_2]]
3. [[GROUP_3]]

---

## 5. CONTENT STRATEGY

### 5.1 Content Pillars for LinkedIn

| Pillar                 | % of Content | Description                          | Example Topics |
| ---------------------- | ------------ | ------------------------------------ | -------------- |
| **Thought Leadership** | 30%          | Industry insights, trends, expertise | [[TOPICS]]     |
| **Company Culture**    | 20%          | Behind-the-scenes, team highlights   | [[TOPICS]]     |
| **Educational**        | 25%          | How-to, tips, best practices         | [[TOPICS]]     |
| **Company News**       | 15%          | Updates, milestones, achievements    | [[TOPICS]]     |
| **Engagement**         | 10%          | Polls, questions, discussions        | [[TOPICS]]     |

### 5.2 Optimal Posting Strategy

**Best Times to Post:**

- Tuesday-Thursday: 8:00-10:00 AM
- Tuesday-Thursday: 12:00 PM
- Tuesday-Thursday: 5:00-6:00 PM

**Best Days:** Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday
**Avoid:** Weekends and Friday afternoons

**Posting Frequency:**

- Minimum: 3x per week
- Optimal: 5x per week
- Maximum: 1x per day

### 5.3 Content Formats That Work

**Format Mix:**

- [ ] **Text-Only Posts:** 40% - Thought leadership, stories, insights
- [ ] **Single Images:** 25% - Infographics, quotes, data visualizations
- [ ] **Multi-Image (Carousel):** 15% - Step-by-step guides, lists
- [ ] **Native Video:** 15% - Expert tips, behind-the-scenes, interviews
- [ ] **Documents/PDFs:** 5% - Whitepapers, guides, case studies

### 5.4 LinkedIn-Specific Features to Use

**LinkedIn Articles (Long-form):**

- [ ] Publish 1-2 articles per month
- [ ] 1000-3000 words
- [ ] SEO-optimized headlines
- [ ] Include images and subheadings

**LinkedIn Newsletters:**

- [ ] Set up company newsletter
- [ ] Weekly or bi-weekly cadence
- [ ] Consistent topic/theme
- [ ] Clear value proposition

**LinkedIn Live:**

- [ ] Monthly live events
- [ ] Q&A sessions
- [ ] Expert interviews
- [ ] Product demonstrations

**LinkedIn Polls:**

- [ ] Weekly engagement polls
- [ ] Industry research
- [ ] Opinion questions
- [ ] Market insights

**LinkedIn Events:**

- [ ] Promote webinars
- [ ] Virtual events
- [ ] Conferences
- [ ] Product launches

---

## 6. ENGAGEMENT STRATEGY

### 6.1 Community Management

**Daily Tasks:**

- [ ] Respond to all comments within 4 hours
- [ ] Monitor mentions and tags
- [ ] Engage with 10-15 posts from target audience
- [ ] Check and respond to DMs

**Weekly Tasks:**

- [ ] Share 3-5 employee posts
- [ ] Comment on industry thought leader posts
- [ ] Participate in relevant group discussions
- [ ] Review analytics and adjust strategy

### 6.2 Employee Advocacy

**Employee Engagement Program:**

- [ ] Create employee advocacy guidelines
- [ ] Encourage employees to follow company page
- [ ] Share company content for employees to reshare
- [ ] Recognize top employee advocates monthly
- [ ] Provide shareable content templates

**Employee Content Ideas:**

- Work anniversaries and milestones
- Project wins and achievements
- Conference attendance
- Professional development
- Behind-the-scenes glimpses

---

## 7. LINKEDIN ADS OVERVIEW

### 7.1 Campaign Objectives

- [ ] **Brand Awareness:** Reach professionals in your target market
- [ ] **Website Visits:** Drive traffic to landing pages
- [ ] **Engagement:** Boost post engagement and page followers
- [ ] **Video Views:** Promote video content
- [ ] **Lead Generation:** Capture leads with native forms
- [ ] **Website Conversions:** Drive specific actions on your site
- [ ] **Job Applicants:** Promote open positions

### 7.2 Targeting Options

**Demographics:**

- Location (country, region, city)
- Company size
- Industry
- Job function
- Job seniority
- Job title
- Years of experience

**Matched Audiences:**

- Website retargeting
- Contact list upload
- Company list upload
- Lookalike audiences

### 7.3 Ad Formats

| Format                | Best For                    | Specs                                |
| --------------------- | --------------------------- | ------------------------------------ |
| **Sponsored Content** | Brand awareness, engagement | 1200x627 image, under 600 MB video   |
| **Message Ads**       | Direct outreach, lead gen   | Subject: 60 chars, Body: 1500 chars  |
| **Dynamic Ads**       | Personalization             | Auto-generated from templates        |
| **Text Ads**          | Simple messaging            | 100x100 logo, 25 char headline       |
| **Video Ads**         | Storytelling                | 3 seconds - 30 minutes, under 200 MB |
| **Carousel Ads**      | Multiple products/features  | 2-10 cards, 1080x1080 images         |
| **Document Ads**      | Lead magnets                | PDF, PPT, DOC under 100 MB           |

**See LinkedIn Ad Campaign Template for detailed campaign planning**

---

## 8. SUCCESS METRICS

### 8.1 Key Performance Indicators

**Follower Growth:**

- Current: [[#]]
- 3-month target: [[#]] (+[[X]]%)
- 6-month target: [[#]] (+[[X]]%)

**Engagement Metrics:**

- Engagement Rate Target: 2-5%
- Average Likes per Post: [[#]]
- Average Comments per Post: [[#]]
- Average Shares per Post: [[#]]

**Content Performance:**

- Click-Through Rate: [[%]]
- Video Views: [[#]]
- Document Downloads: [[#]]

**Lead Generation:**

- Leads generated: [[#]]
- Cost per lead: $[[AMOUNT]]
- Conversion rate: [[%]]

### 8.2 Benchmarking

**Industry Averages (B2B):**

- Engagement Rate: 0.5-2%
- Click-Through Rate: 0.4-0.6%
- Follower Growth: 2-5% monthly

---

## 9. TOOLS & RESOURCES

### 9.1 Recommended Tools

- [ ] **Scheduling:** Hootsuite, Buffer, Sprout Social, or Later
- [ ] **Analytics:** LinkedIn Page Analytics, Shield, or Taplio
- [ ] **Design:** Canva, Adobe Creative Suite
- [ ] **Employee Advocacy:** EveryoneSocial, LinkedIn Elevate
- [ ] **Lead Gen:** LinkedIn Lead Gen Forms, HubSpot integration

### 9.2 Content Calendar Template

Use the Content Calendar Template adapted for LinkedIn posting schedule

---

## 10. OPTIMIZATION CHECKLIST

**Weekly:**

- [ ] Review post performance analytics
- [ ] Engage with comments and messages
- [ ] Share employee content
- [ ] Monitor competitor pages

**Monthly:**

- [ ] Analyze follower demographics
- [ ] Review content performance trends
- [ ] Update featured section
- [ ] Audit page completeness

**Quarterly:**

- [ ] Review and update About section
- [ ] Refresh visual branding
- [ ] Analyze competitor positioning
- [ ] Adjust content strategy based on data

**Annually:**

- [ ] Complete page audit
- [ ] Update company information
- [ ] Review and optimize URL
- [ ] Archive outdated content
